response: The People Team shared Q1 employee engagement survey results: an overall 7.8/10 score (above the 7.2/10 industry average), with team collaboration (8.9/10) as the highest-rated category and career growth clarity (6.1/10) as the lowest. The team has proposed three targeted actions to address the low career growth clarity—quarterly career conversations, an internal mobility program, and mentorship matching—and will host a town hall on Friday to discuss these plans.
